name: Obby Rotty
description: Created and released my first Roblox game together with a friend where players run up a parkour to the top of a tower. Implemented module-based scripting with a clear client and server architecture separating game logic cleanly across both sides. The game achieved a total of 2825 players.
description_short: A Roblox parkour game where players race up a tower. Built with Luau using a module-based client/server architecture. 2825 total players.
